0.content: She later won a second Nobel Prize in Chemistry in 1911

1.content: Together they won the Nobel Prize in Physics in 1903

2.content: He won the Nobel Prize in Physics in 1921

3.content: Curie moved to Paris to study at the Sorbonne University

4.content: She conducted research on radioactivity and discovered the elements polonium and radium

5.content: She was born in Warsaw, Poland in 1867

6.content: Albert Einstein was a theoretical physicist who developed the theory of relativity

7.content: He was born in Ulm, Germany in 1879

8.content: Einstein worked at Princeton University in New Jersey

9.content: Einstein collaborated with other scientists including Niels Bohr and Max Planck

10.content: Their daughter Irene Joliot-Curie also became a famous scientist

11.content: He befriended Charlie Chaplin, who invited Einstein to the premiere of his film City Lights

12.content: Marie Curie married Pierre Curie, a French physicist

14.content: Marie Curie was a Polish-born physicist and chemist
